action_text: Open the chart’s context/options menu (to access a data table or similar details)
rationale: Seeing the underlying data table will let us quickly read exact incident counts per agent and identify the minimum without guessing from bar heights.

action_text: Hover over a small bar near the right end of the chart to read its tooltip
rationale: Hovering the smallest bar near the far right (likely an individual agent) should display a tooltip with the agent’s name and exact incident count to find the minimum.

action_text: Hover over the adjacent small bar to the left to view its tooltip
rationale: Check the next smallest bar (slightly left of the rightmost) to compare counts and confirm the minimum value across agents.

action_text: Hover over another small bar toward the right-middle to view its tooltip
rationale: Continue scanning small bars to ensure we capture all agents tied at the minimum incident count.

action_text: Hover over a small bar further left to view its tooltip
rationale: Expand the scan slightly further left among the shorter bars to identify any additional agents with the same minimal count.
